description_long: This is a modern, self-balancing hoverboard with a sleek, streamlined body finished in a vibrant blue color. The device features two large, black rubberized wheels on either side, each partially enclosed by the blue plastic housing. The top surface has two black, textured footpads designed for grip and stability, separated by a central joint that allows for independent wheel movement. Subtle LED indicators and a charging port are visible near the center, suggesting electronic functionality and user feedback. The overall construction appears robust, with a hard plastic shell and reinforced wheel wells for durability. Branding is present on one side, reading 'INX BOARDS' in white and red text.
description: A blue, self-balancing hoverboard with black wheels, textured footpads, and visible branding on the side. Features include LED indicators and a robust plastic shell.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the blue hoverboard, both black footpads, and the smooth, curved body.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting one large black wheel, the rounded blue housing, and a small LED indicator above the wheel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the 'INX BOARDS' branding, both footpads, and the overall symmetry of the hoverboard.
description_view_3: Rear view similar to the front, showing the other wheel, rounded housing, and a small LED indicator.
attribute_wheel_configuration: Two large, parallel wheels located at each end of the board, partially enclosed by the blue housing; wheels are black with a solid, robust design.
attribute_footpad_design: Two rectangular black footpads with a textured, grippy surface for traction; positioned symmetrically on either side of the central joint, slightly recessed into the blue plastic shell, likely containing pressure sensors for control.
attribute_lighting_features: Small green LED indicators located near the center of the board, above each wheel, likely for status indication or battery level.
attribute_brand_logo: A visible brand logo on one side reads 'INX BOARDS' in white and red text.
attribute_control_interface: No traditional control interfaces are visible; operation is likely through pressure sensors embedded in the footpads.
